case_title: CAMILLE ALEXIA NELSON VS. BLANCA ELVIRA GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDAT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,871.62 FILED BY NELSON, CAMILLE ALEXIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, BLANCA ELVIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, BLANCA ELVIRA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-12-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, BLANCA ELVIRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NELSON, CAMILLE ALEXIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, BLANCA ELVIRA $2,725.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,775.00, THE DAMAGE AWARD IS BASED ON THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
